name: Tom
manager_notes: Tom moved teams recently and delivery is steady, but Principal-level impact is not visible yet. Previous feedback said he needs early expectation alignment, and he still asks very few questions. I want to test whether he understands what Principal scope means on this team or if he is still operating on old assumptions. I also need to understand whether cross-team trust and judgment calls are developing or whether he is staying in safe execution mode.
answers: Thinks he's shipping, but unsure he's aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
Can describe Principal impact in general, but this team's bar still feels fuzzy.
Mostly stayed in his lane instead of forcing cross-team decisions.
Made a few calls independently, but still over-indexes on being safe.
Probably should ask for sharper feedback earlier than he does.
Hasn't built enough trust with adjacent teams yet.
The gap is less technical, more around visible ownership.
Needs explicit expectations for the next cycle to calibrate fast.
Will pick one recent deliverable and write down the decision rule he used before next check-in.
